title: crassula forskoleana
intro: Crassula forskoleana, also known as the "Forskohlii plant", is a species of succulent that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate the heart and improve cardiovascular health. The plant's active compound, forskolin, has been shown to have various health benefits, including weight loss, improved blood sugar control, and anti-inflammatory properties. Forskolin can be found in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and extracts, and is often used as a dietary supplement to support overall health and well-being.
